Quartzbloom Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Ingrid Stargazer. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Good morning! Hope the weekend was restful.
By the way, someone named Bastian Cobblewick emailed about partnerships. Never heard of them.
